arabic: التَّوَكُّلُ عَلَى اللهِ هُوَ اعْتِمَادُ الْقَلْبِ عَلَى الْخَالِقِ وَحْدَهُ مَعَ الْأَخْذِ بِالْأَسْبَابِ. ذَكَرَ الْإِمَامُ ابْنُ الْقَيِّمِ أَنَّ التَّوَكُّلَ نِصْفُ الدِّينِ، وَالنِّصْفُ الثَّانِي هُوَ الْإِنَابَةُ. يَعْنِي ذَلِكَ أَنَّ الْمُسْلِمَ يَعْمَلُ بِجِدٍّ، لَكِنَّهُ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّ التَّوْفِيقَ بِيَدِ اللهِ فَقَطْ. مَنْ تَوَكَّلَ عَلَى اللهِ كَفَاهُ هَمَّهُ وَيَسَّرَ لَهُ أَمْرَهُ. هَذَا الْخُلُقُ يَمْلأُ الْقَلْبَ بِالطُّمَأْنِينَةِ وَالرِّضَا بِالْقَدَرِ.
translation: Oslonac na Allaha (tevekkul) je oslanjanje srca isključivo na Stvoritelja uz poduzimanje potrebnih uzroka. Imam Ibn el-Kajjim je spomenuo da je tevekkul polovina vjere, a druga polovina je povratak Allahu. To znači da musliman naporno radi, ali zna da je uspjeh samo u Allahovim rukama. Ko se osloni na Allaha, On mu je dovoljan u njegovim brigama i olakša mu njegove poslove. Ova osobina ispunjava srce smirenošću i zadovoljstvom sudbinom.
translationEn: Trust in Allah (Tawakkul) is the heart's reliance on the Creator alone while taking the necessary means. Imam Ibn al-Qayyim mentioned that Tawakkul is half of the religion, and the other half is turning to Allah in repentance. This means that a Muslim works hard, but knows that success is in the hands of Allah only. Whoever relies on Allah, He will suffice him in his concerns and ease his affairs. This character trait fills the heart with tranquility and satisfaction with destiny.
